# Feature: Floating overlay toolbar (Scriptony-style)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-09 -->

## Intent
Replace the large separate inspector panel with a single floating overlay docked to the host Tauri window: vertical icon toolbar (hard reload, screenshot, picker, text panel) plus a context text box with copy/clear. Auto-opens with the host app; no host-demo toolbar required.

## Preconditions
- Plugin registered with `visual-inspector` feature and `plugins.visualEditor.enabled: true`
- Host capability includes `visual-editor:all`
- App running in debug/dev (`allowInProduction` not required)

## Happy Path
- [ ] Overlay window opens automatically when the first host webview is ready
- [ ] Overlay is frameless, always-on-top, docked on the right of the main window
- [ ] Picker button toggles inspector enable/disable (guest hover/selection on host webviews)
- [ ] Screenshot button triggers `capture` and shows success feedback
- [ ] Hard reload button reloads the active target webview
- [ ] Text panel toggles open; shows selected elements summary and editable issue text
- [ ] Copy copies context bundle to clipboard; Clear clears session
- [ ] react-vite example no longer shows host InspectorToolbar buttons

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Overlay does not register itself as an inspectable host webview
- [ ] Inspector disabled state: picker off, overlay still visible

## Regression
- [ ] `npm run checks` passes
- [ ] Guest overlay hover/selection still works when picker enabled
- [ ] `open` / `toggle` commands still show/hide overlay

## Assumptions
- Solid (non-transparent) overlay background is acceptable for V1; true transparency deferred
- Overlay reposition on parent move is best-effort on open only

## Implementation Notes
- Files touched: `crates/plugin/src/inspector_window.rs`, `crates/plugin/src/lib.rs`, `packages/inspector-app/src/App.tsx`, `FloatingToolbar.tsx`, `ContextPanel.tsx`, `api.ts`, `overlaySize.ts`, `index.css`, `examples/react-vite/src/App.tsx`
- Overlay auto-opens on first host webview ready when security gates pass
- Host demo toolbar removed; plugin UI is overlay-only
- Unit tests: overlay dimension smoke test in `inspector_window.rs`
- Limitation: overlay reposition on parent move not yet implemented; solid toolbar background (no OS transparency)
